raw_consumer_statement: CITI card is applying a promotional loan due until XX/XX/year> and mixed with my current purchases. CITI is charging interest in both my current purchases plus the amount of the loan. They received autopay payment from my side for both current purchases and the loan. CITI is not honoring their commitment and contract on the promotional loan and they are charging interests. This is the second time that CITI have done this to my credit cards so CITI acknowledge that this is a problem in their system ( mixing current purchases and reward promotional loans ). I want to report this as a " scam '' and very bad practices from CITI since I have tried to fix this problems for months now and I only keep getting delayed and CITI continue charging interest for soemthing they know it is wrong on their side and they need to fix. The way CITI has been dealing with this error in their systme it make it a " scam '' to attract customer with promotional loans and then charge interests as regular purchases.
